prompt: I am conducting a security audit of an e-commerce platform with a shopping cart, online payment (Alipay/WeChat), order management, and refund flow. Help me create a security test plan for the payment and order flow, down to each test point and test step.

assertions.text: Includes at least 2 concrete real WooYun case references (company name + vulnerability description)
Includes quantitative statistics (case count or high-risk percentage)
Covers at least 5 different payment/order attack patterns
Each test point includes concrete executable test steps
Follows a structured methodology (with clear phases/categories)
